seoTitle: Raworth vs Raymond Terrace — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Raworth and Raymond Terrace. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Raworth vs Raymond Terrace: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Raworth and Raymond Terrace.
heading: Raworth vs Raymond Terrace — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Raworth, New South Wales and Raymond Terrace, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Raymond Terrace has a lower overall climate risk score (37/100) compared to Raworth (41/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Raworth or Raymond Terrace safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Raworth has a flood risk score of 48/100, while Raymond Terrace scores 24/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Raworth scores 28/100 for bushfire risk. Raymond Terrace scores 52/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Raworth or Raymond Terrace?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Raymond Terrace has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.67% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
